posts.title: The Future

‘A Lot Of Votes May Not Count’: The Supreme Court appears ready to Upend WA. State, Mail-In Ballot Rules For Federal Races By Nov. 2026.  SCOTUS heard arguments on March 16 in a case out of Mississippi that could Require ALL Ballots Containing Federal Races To Be Physically Received By Election Day.

link_metadata.description: The U.S. Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could require all ballots containing federal races to be physically received by Election Day.
